'''''Tanyay''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Cargo ferry]] that arrived at the [[Elliirad Platform]] to pick up [[Glavsled]] while the platform was under attack by a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] strike force consisting of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] what were targeting the freighters, [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]] attempting to provide starfighter support for the Y-wings and a commando unit in a stolen [[Delta-class JV-7 escort shuttle|Escort shuttle]] intending to destroy the station with explosives.<ref name="X-Wing vs TIE fighter" />

==Behind the scenes==
The outcome depends on what happens during the mission, it is either destroyed or escapes into hyperspace.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''
